clean_story:
Now I will teach you Caveman.

Caveman is like you—hairy, strong, walks on two legs. He hunts with sharp rock, eats meat from fire, sleeps in cave or under big sky. He grunts, points, hits things to talk. His hands make tools, his eyes watch for danger. He fears big teeth, dark night, strange tribe. When you see hairy man with stick and fire-smell, that is Caveman.
